title: Chapter 3
content:
Chapter 3: Chapter 3: Eat Together With Your Mom Because She Feels Lonely

The system popped up again... indicating that what had just happened and the way the woman treated him was completely real.

It’s not a joke, a play and ploy...the motherly treatment he recieved is truly, and entirely true.

Owen then understood everything... as he took over the place of the protagonist, he had also taken on his exact role.

It meant that even though they were not actually blood-related to such a degree, Owen would get the full son treatment.

It was a weird turn of events... but he didn’t care about that as a sudden Quest suddenly popped up right in front of his face... sparling a blue motes as the screen pop out.

Ding!

[ MILF Quest!]

[ Eat Together With Your Mom Because She Feels Lonely.]

Reward: MILF Token 1 / 41 Exp Points!

Failure: Cock Disfunction!

[ Note: Play your part or your divine one will turn into a dried eggplant! ]

"Hell, what kind of insanity is this. This is my first journey and the failure penalty is brutal..." Owen subconsciously covered his crotch as the ridiculous text displayed on the screen.

The note is even more ridiculous as the system teased him, imagine turning your 12-inch long asset into a pale, dried eggplant...that would be disastrous, for any man, even a death of the spirit.

He didn’t dwell of the punishment as the quest is the most important.

Well, it wasn’t really that bad after recalling the busty figure of his mother... he could pound that voluptuous body for an entire year non stop!

Owen would bet that his asset can last for as long as he want...it’s a divine thing afterall and divine can be categorized as God level!

"Hehe... then let’s go, shall we? It’s just a simple meal anyway, and I’m hungry after that long day." Owen was still feeling starved... he hadn’t even eaten anything after arriving at his apartment earlier because he didn’t have any food left.

Owen got up and readied himself.

At least he didn’t look bad as he checked himself in the mirror...he was handsome as always... even more so now, especially with his stylish, raven-black hair.

Well, Owen had been handsome ever since he was a kid, but because he only liked playing video games and reading novels, he had completely forgotten at some point that he was actually a handsome man.

His height was 6’0" feet tall, a decent height for any man...also at some point, height didn’t really matter as long as you carried a monstrosity under your pants.

Any MILF would completely surrender to his asset...no matter what kind of circumstances he is in.

He still felt a bit blank regarding how the leveling system worked... but it wasn’t a matter that needed to be addressed at the moment because he could hear the gentle voice of his mother... not actually his biological one, but it wasn’t bad to play along.

"I’m the son... hehe, a loving son." Owen opened the door as his lingering voice echoed... he really had some wild thoughts running through his mind!

"Oh my... now let’s eat!" Arielle clasped her hands together, thoroughly satisfied to see her son. It was really important to her to have a delightful dinner with him.

Ding!

Name: Arielle

Age: 36 years old

Level of Affection: Family - 44/100

[Current Feeling:Happy]

[Note: Arielle is so happy that her son is having a meal with her! ]

"Oh my... I’m really thankful, my dear son." Arielle sat down at the table as she prepared the plates.

"Hmm..." Owen simply sat down... he didn’t have any wild thoughts at the moment because the dishes presented to him completely flipped his entire bearings.

It was a bountiful meal for sure...one that made him forget that such luxury even existed.

There was hot soup, braised beef, chicken nuggets, some crispy fried chicken, fresh bread, and many delicious side dishes!

Gulp...

"Oh my... let’s eat now, my dear Wen~" She was satisfied to see that her son really liked what she had cooked... after all, these had been some of his favorites since he was a teenager.

"So... how was work in the city? You’ve only visited our home now after you started living in the city." Arielle asked. She was really curious to know what life was like for her dear son after leaving his birthplace, the current place where his mother resided.

"Oh... it’s not that bad. Just a bit hectic, but it’s okay, Mom," Owen spoke... as he shamelessly lied.

Well, it wasn’t truly a lie, because he had experienced that exact hardship beforehand.

’So, the setting really did change...’ Owen thought.

He still recalled that the man in the original game was just a jobless bastard who simply relied on his mother... but who would have thought that the setting would entirely focus on him instead.

The setting had completely shifted from a jobless man to a son who lived in the city and came back for a vacation.

Though it was still much the same... the whole underlying structure had changed because of his presence as a variable.

Meaning... he didn’t have any cheat codes to simply walkthrough the entire taming process!

’Oh... maybe it’s not a bad thing. I can fully enjoy everything as I explore this village.’ His adventurous side was instantly ignited.

"Oh... that’s good to hear! How about you stay here for a few years?" Arielle really wanted to have some good quality time with her son, she was lonely since her husband was also far away.

Leaving her to live all alone in a big house... for years she had felt truly isolated, so she was incredibly happy that Owen had come back to take a vacation.

"I don’t mind..." Owen said, smiling as he looked into the begging eyes of his mother.

How could he even reject such an offer from a busty MILF.

It was really a crime to look at her beautiful face... she was a true man-killer, and Owen was no exception.
